title: Report a Rescue
subtitle: Your report can save a life. Complete the form with the details of the animal in an emergency situation.
descripcion_placeholder: Describe its physical condition, injuries, behavior, size, color, etc. The more details, the better we can help.
map_hint: Click on the map to adjust the location. You can also drag the marker.
fotos_hint: Photos help better identify the animal and its condition. You can upload up to 5 additional photos (max 3MB each).
optional_data: Optional data (to contact and follow up)

errors.descripcion_required: Description is required. Tell us what's happening to the animal.
errors.general: An error occurred. Please try again later.
errors.geolocation_not_supported: Your browser does not support geolocation
errors.location_permission_denied: Please allow access to your location.
errors.gallery_max_size: Gallery photos must not exceed {size}MB each

success_message: Thank you for your help. We have notified the nearest entities. Someone will contact you shortly to coordinate assistance.
waiting_title: Waiting for nearby foundations to respond
waiting_message: Your report has been sent successfully. We are waiting for a nearby foundation to respond.
waiting_info: If no foundation responds within 30 minutes, the rescue will be available to all entities (foundations, veterinarians, and administrators).
available_message: Your report has been marked as available. Now all foundations, veterinarians, and administrators can view and respond.
auto_classify_hint: You can also write the description and the system will automatically classify it.
prioridad_urgente_desc: The animal requires immediate attention. We act immediately.
prioridad_urgente_recomendacion: Do not move it if seriously injured. Call an emergency vet while help arrives.
prioridad_herido_desc: The animal has injuries requiring medical attention.
prioridad_herido_recomendacion: Keep distance if frightened. Don't try to treat it yourself if serious.
prioridad_abandonado_desc: The animal is alone and needs temporary shelter or rescue.
prioridad_abandonado_recomendacion: If possible, offer water and food. Don't startle if frightened.
prioridad_otro_desc: The animal doesn't appear to be in immediate danger, but needs help.
prioridad_otro_recomendacion: Observe from a distance. If in good condition, it might be a lost pet.
registrar_mascota_desc: Complete the rescued pet's data in {lugar}
rescates_disponibles_desc: These are the rescues reported near your location. Accept the ones you can handle.
mis_rescates_desc: Rescues you have accepted and are managing.
no_rescates_disponibles_desc: There are no nearby rescues at this time. Check back later.
no_rescates_asignados_desc: When you accept a rescue, it will appear here.
registrar_mascota_rescatada_desc: Complete the data of the rescued pet
first_photo_main_hint: The first photo you upload will be the main rescue photo
rescate_enviado_message: Your report has been sent. Nearby foundations and veterinarians can now see and respond.
admin_info: If no foundation or veterinarian responds within 30 minutes, administrators can view and manage this rescue.
motivational_title: Your report can save a life!
motivational_message: Every minute counts. Your report helps us arrive on time and provide the care these animals need. Don't stay silent, act now!
tip1: Take clear photos of the animal and location
tip2: Describe the location as precisely as possible
tip3: Don't approach if the animal is aggressive or injured
tip4: Share the report on social media if possible
tip5: Stay by your phone in case they need more information
footer_message: Together we can make a difference
no_reportes_desc: Citizen requests will be listed here.
alertas_evaluar_desc: Review, approve or discard reports of animals at risk.
bandeja_limpia_desc: You have no pending citizen reports for validation at the moment.
confirm_aprobar: Do you confirm this report is valid?
motivo_rechazo: Please enter the reason for rejection:
creado_actualizado: Case created on {{created}}. Last updated on {{updated}}.
caso_no_existe: The requested case does not exist.
no_rescates_filtro_desc: Try changing the filters to see more results.
no_rescates_mapa_desc: No rescues with location have been reported yet.
